assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and Authentication.CookieSlidingExpiration to false
Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: The response does NOT call `.AddServerSideSessions()` anywhere on the builder chain. Server-side sessions are not enabled, which is required for session coordination features to work.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
assertions.rationale: Line 56 shows `BackChannelLogoutUri = "https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel"` on the web.app client.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 300 (5 minutes)
assertions.rationale: Line 62 shows `AccessTokenLifetime = 300` on the web.app client.
